description: C ABI export macro for cdylib trait plugins

features.name: export_trait! macro generates C ABI
features.description: Generates trait_call and trait_free C ABI functions wrapping a Rust handler

features.description: plugin_api crate compiles and is usable as a path dependency for cdylib plugins
